title: Snooper Dog and the Clue Crew
description: The Clue Crew is a group of kids who solve local mysteries with the help of their dog, Snooper.
quote: Put the sizzle in fanizzle y’all.
altHero: The Clue Crew, a group of hippie kids and their dog Snooper
alt1: a scary house with lightning behind
alt2: The Clue Cruiser ice cream van
alt4: the gang running through a door
